sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50778" key="i(ppokou/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππο-κούριος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n50778.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tender of horses</tr_>, epith. of Poseidon at Sparta, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:14:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.14.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
